login.title: Welcome back.
login.subtitle: Sign in to pick up your journal — wines, moments, and places, right where you left them.

errors.invalidCredentialsBody: Double-check and try again, or reset your password.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password.
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email tied to your MomentoVino account. We'll send a 6-digit code to use on the next screen.

codeStep.title: Enter your code.
codeStep.resendIdle: Didn't get it? Send a new code
codeStep.invalidCodeBody: Double-check the 6-digit code from the email or request a new one.

passwordStep.title: Choose a new password.
passwordStep.subtitle: At least 8 characters. Use something only you'd remember.
passwordStep.successBody: Sign in with your new password.

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose the language used throughout the app.

welcome.headline: Your travels-through-wine, one beautiful journal.
welcome.subtitle: Scan a label, pin the moment, keep the memory forever.

goal.headline: What brings you to MomentoVino?
goal.subtitle: Pick all that apply — we'll tailor your journal around them.

options.travels: Build a journal of my wine travels
options.share: Share wine memories with family & friends

pain.headline: Which of these sounds like you?
pain.subtitle: Pick all that apply — no wrong answers.

options.forget_names: I forget the name of wines I loved
options.buried_photos: My wine photos are buried in my camera roll
options.friend_asks: When a friend asks "what was that wine?", I go blank
options.trip_blur: I can't remember what I drank on that trip last year

introCreate.headline: Let's add your first bottle.
introCreate.subtitle: The journal starts with a single moment. Three quick steps and your atlas has its first pin.
introCreate.step1Body: Snap or pick the bottle's label — we'll fill in the producer, region and notes for you.
introCreate.step2Body: Add a title, the place, the date — even a photo of the night, if you have one.
introCreate.step3Body: Your bottle gets pinned to your personal wine map. The first of many.

scanner.title: Scan the label
scanner.subtitle: Align the bottle inside the frame, then capture
scanner.permissionBody: We open the camera so you can photograph the label in one tap.

errors.permissionNeededBody: Allow photo library access to pick wine photos.

newMoment.descriptionPlaceholder: Who was there, what made it special…
newMoment.locationPermissionDeniedHint: You can still search for a city below.

errors.permissionNeededBody: Allow photo library access to add pictures.

atlas.headline: Your first memory is on your atlas.
atlas.subtitle: One bottle, one place — the start of your journal.
atlas.hint: Tap your moment later to add photos, edit details, or share it with family.
atlas.shareMessage: I just started my wine atlas on MomentoVino 🍷

paywall.headline: Your wine memories, forever.
paywall.subtitle: Unlimited moments. Unlimited bottles. One beautiful journal you'll still have in 10 years.

benefits.atlas: Your wine atlas, every bottle on the map
benefits.family: Share with family, register moments together
benefits.story: Save the story behind every bottle

paywall.reassureYearly: Billed annually. Cancel renewal anytime in Settings.
paywall.reassureMonthly: Free for 3 days, then {{price}}/month. Cancel anytime to avoid being charged.

errors.unavailableBody: Could not load subscription options. Please try again.
errors.nothingToRestoreBody: No active subscription found on this Apple ID.

saveAccount.headline: Save your wine journal.
saveAccount.subtitle: Your subscription is yours — pick how you want to sign in so we can keep your moments safe across every device.
saveAccount.legalEmail: By creating an account you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
saveAccount.legalProviders: By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy. Your subscription is already active on this Apple ID — sign in to attach it to your account.

errors.checkInboxBody: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Tap it to verify your email — your subscription is already saved on this account.
errors.alreadyExistsBody: This email is already registered. Sign in instead — your purchase will be transferred to that account on this Apple ID.

completeProfile.headline: Almost there
completeProfile.subtitle: Confirm how we should address you and accept the legal terms to finish creating your account.

errors.failedFallback: Could not finish setup. Try again.
